items.name_cn:
In stock❗️
Goyard Beluga Basket Red♥️
The vintage large tote basket is now "born"!!
Sure enough, any bag looks cute when it shrinks🥰🥰
However, this is cute with a touch of ceremony
Because of these handles~the whole bag is elevated
Usually, the Beluga basket is open
The designer was thoughtful to add a drawstring pouch inside
A basket that can be closed gives peace of mind
I placed an order immediately after the agent posted the photo
This must be snatched up, a sure-fire hit🔥
A hit requires speed and accuracy!
Otherwise, if you clash with someone else's bag, the one with the wrong version will be awkward
Our craftsmanship needs no explanation, buy with confidence and wear with confidence!
6045🔴23×18.5×8cm

items.name_cn:
Goyard Belvédère|| Suede New Arrival
❤️The classic traits of the Belvédère||: simple, elegant, lightweight, and practical. The single narrow strap buckle flows smoothly through the metal ring, opening and closing with ease; the leather trim highlights the bag's outline with lines, and the leather lining on the flap makes the silhouette more three-dimensional. The Belvédère|| features three interior pockets for organizing daily essentials, and a detachable shoulder strap allows it to be worn as a crossbody or shoulder bag. Its clever design is a new interpretation of Goyard's traditional craftsmanship, while also showcasing an ultimate minimalist style and sports fashion spirit 👻
Medium Size: 28*19*7.5Cm
🔍020183-1

items.name_cn:
Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
Inheriting the brand's unique craftsmanship and exquisite techniques: detachable shoulder strap, embedded wooden details, leather corners, large zipper, yellow lining, and its unique shell shape. More modern and refined, showcasing a woman's softness and lightness. Can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand 👇🏻👇🏻
11 colors available: Black, Brown, Red, Burgundy, Yellow, Green, Grey, White, Sky Blue, and Navy Blue. 🌈
Size: 23cm (L) x 18.5cm (H) x 10cm (W)
020205

More modern and refined, showcasing a woman's softness and lightness. Can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand 👇🏻👇🏻
11 colors available: Black, Brown, Red, Burgundy, Yellow, Green, Grey, White, Sky Blue, and Navy Blue. 🌈
Size: 23cm (L) x 18.5cm (H) x 10cm (W)
020205
